plurals.name: processing_errors2
plurals.item: Ekar wor %1$d bōd ko kar loe ilo ien kōkāāl, lale %2$s log ko ñan melele ko

Ekar wor %1$d bōd ilo ien kōkāāl, lale %2$s log ko ñan melele ko

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Ekar wor %1$d bōd ko kar loe ilo %2$s file eo, lale %2$s file eo ilo %3$s ak lale %4$s log ko ñan melele ko
